record.field: Request handover to a human operator for the current livechat conversation. Use this tool when you determine that a human should take over the conversation, such as when dealing with complex issues, sensitive matters, or when specifically requested by the user.
I can transfer your conversation to a human operator when needed.
Create a phone callback request when a user prefers to be contacted by phone rather than chat. This creates a to-do item for an operator to call the user back.
I can arrange for a support representative to call you back at your preferred phone number.
